one_time_description: Income from investment in government business enterprises, partnership and Tahltan Heritage Trust (TNDLP share of income)
economic_notes: Iskut Band Development Corporation operates Kluachon Centre Store (cafe, retail, gas, groceries). Band holds 33.33% of Tahltan Nation Development Limited Partnership which provides construction and support services. Band participates in BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP. COVID-19 noted as ongoing uncertainty.
notes: Audit is qualified on multiple bases: (1) Iskut Band Development Corporation not consolidated due to lack of updated financial information; (2) Tahltan Nation Development Limited Partnership income not confirmed as financials are unaudited; (3) Tahltan Heritage Trust accounting method change from modified equity to cost not confirmed appropriate; (4) Volcano Creek Limited Partnership transfer accounting unresolved; (5) Tahltan Nation Community Development Corporation dissolution impact unknown. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $4,483,034 + CMHC $192,962 + FNHA $2,881,600 + FNESC $377,614 + Province of BC $272,469 + BCFNGRS LP $686,231 = $8,893,910. OSR = $12,312,325 - $8,893,910 = $3,418,415 (excludes GBP income). Obligations under capital lease of $348,000 not included in long_term_debt figure. Prior year shows large loss of $10,922,058 from GBP investments. Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024 as template default.
